title: meionandra columella
side_effects: Meionandra columella can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing liver damage, increased risk of bleeding, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Ingesting large amounts of the plant's extract can lead to vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach pain. Prolonged use of the plant's essential oil can cause skin irritation, respiratory issues, and headaches in sensitive individuals. Improper handling and preparation of the plant can also result in the formation of toxic compounds, which can exacerbate existing health conditions.
